title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Starbucks India International Enterprises in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Starbucks India International Enterprises:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
